== Notes for [[Item:Q88693|Q88693]] ==

Cyaxares or Hvakhshathra; r. 625–585 BC), the son of King Phraortes, was the third and most capable king of Media. According to Herodotus, Cyaxares, grandson of Deioces,...

He was born in the Median capital of Ecbatana, his father Phraortes was killed in a battle against the Assyrians, led by Ashurbanipal, the king of Neo-Assyria. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cyaxares

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01199.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
King of Media

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
